# SofraPiwas

> SofraPiwas — from sofra (Turkish: a table laid for guests) and piwas (Kurdish: onion) — is a restaurant-management platform
> built in the Netherlands and proven in daily service in Geneva, Switzerland:
> QR menus & online ordering, live order boards for kitchen/cashier/servers,
> reservations, loyalty points, and thermal-printer kitchen tickets — one
> warm-hearted system instead of five subscriptions.

Site: https://sofrapiwas.com (English /en, French /fr, German /de, Dutch /nl,
Turkish /tr, Arabic /ar)

## What SofraPiwas does

- QR menus & ordering: guests scan, browse and order from the table — photos,
  allergens, customizations; no app install. Menus speak 10 languages
  (English, French, German, Dutch, Italian, Spanish, Turkish, Arabic, Russian
  and Chinese).
- Live order boards: kitchen, cashier and servers each get a real-time view;
  orders arrive the second they are placed.
- Reservations: online booking, table planning, working hours, one-tap approval.
- Loyalty: fidelity points and per-group discount rules that bring regulars back.
- Kitchen printing: a companion app (Windows + Android) drives ESC/POS thermal
  printers over the network.
- Domains: every restaurant gets a free subdomain; you can connect a domain
  you already own, or SofraPiwas registers a new one for you during setup.

## Company

SofraPiwas is built by a Netherlands-registered company. First market: Switzerland;
next: the Netherlands and France, then the rest of Europe.

## Proof

SofraPiwas runs every live service at RUMI Restaurant, Geneva
(https://www.rumirestaurant.ch) — orders, kitchen board, reservations and
printers, in production since June 2026.
Case study: https://sofrapiwas.com/en/case/rumi

## More pages

- What's new (dated changelog): https://sofrapiwas.com/en/changelog
- SofraPiwas vs GloriaFood (honest, sourced comparison, updated 2026-07):
  https://sofrapiwas.com/en/compare/gloriafood
All pages exist in every site language (/en /fr /de /nl /tr /ar).

## Pricing

Early access: free for founding restaurants ("on the house"), with white-glove
onboarding and a lifetime discount when regular pricing arrives. Regular
plans: simple flat monthly pricing with optional add-on modules. No card
required, no lock-in.

## For partners

SofraPiwas runs a partner program (agencies/individuals who onboard restaurants and
earn commissions): https://sofrapiwas.com/#partner

## Contact

Demo / call / quote — no waitlist, restaurants are onboarded directly:
https://sofrapiwas.com/#waitlist
